---
title: "It had to be U - the SVD song"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-12-17"
categories:
  - "Community and Events"
  - "Publications"
---

This song reminds me the several hours that I spent in the undergraduate course of matrix algebra for statisticians in UNAL.

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JEYLfIVvR9I)
